creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
mail/gmime24-sharp maintainer address is currently bsd-sharp@googlegroups.com

This has to be changed to mono@FreeBSD.org.

It has been fixed in the BSD# repository:
http://code.google.com/p/bsd-sharp/source/diff?spec=svn402&r=402&format=side&path=/trunk/mail/gmime24-sharp/Makefile

Thanks!
